title: Genesis: AgentScribe Implementation
description:
## Genesis Bead
Tied to plan: /home/coding/AgentScribe/docs/plan.md

## Overview
AgentScribe is a Rust CLI binary that scrapes conversation logs from multiple coding agent types (Claude Code, Aider, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf), normalizes them into a canonical format, stores them as flat files with a Tantivy search index, and provides a query interface for agents seeking past solutions.

## Progress
- [ ] Phase 1: Plugin System, Scraping & Normalization (agentscribe-mkg) — IN PROGRESS
- [ ] Phase 2: Tantivy Indexing & Search
- [ ] Phase 3: Enrichment & Intelligence
- [ ] Phase 4: Daemon Mode & MCP
- [ ] Phase 5: SQLite Format Support & Extended Agents
- [ ] Phase 6: Analytics, Knowledge Synthesis & Shell Integration

## Status
Project initialized with documentation and plan. Phase 1 bead created and dependency established. No code written yet.

title: Phase 1: Plugin System, Scraping & Normalization
description:
## Phase 1: Plugin System, Scraping & Normalization

### Objectives
- Implement plugin system with TOML-based scraper definitions
- Build format-specific parsers (JSONL, Markdown, JSON tree)
- Implement session detection strategies (one-file-per-session, timestamp-gap, delimiter)
- Bundle default plugins for Claude Code, Aider, OpenCode, Codex
- Normalize all formats to canonical event schema
- Track scrape state for incremental scrapes
- Implement skip-and-log error handling at every level
- Extract file paths from events (structured + regex fallback)

### CLI Commands
-  - Initialize global config and data directory
-  - Discover and read agent log files
-  - List available plugins
-  - Validate plugin definitions
-  - Show plugin details

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Plugin TOML schema defined and documented
- [ ] JSONL parser with field mapping support
- [ ] Markdown parser with delimiter-based session detection
- [ ] JSON tree parser for OpenCode format
- [ ] Canonical event schema implementation
- [ ] Scrape state tracking (last-byte-offset, last-modified, session IDs)
- [ ] Incremental scraping (seek to offset on re-run)
- [ ] Error handling: skip malformed lines/fields/files with logging
- [ ] File path extraction from tool_call fields
- [ ] File path extraction via regex from content strings
- [ ] Bundled plugins: claude-code.toml, aider.toml, opencode.toml, codex.toml
- [ ] Data directory layout: config.toml, plugins/, sessions/, state/
- [ ] CLI commands functional

### References
- Plan: /home/coding/AgentScribe/docs/plan.md
- Plugin authoring guide: /home/coding/AgentScribe/plugins/BUILDING_PLUGINS.md
